title: End Game Totems
description: Adds 4 new totems that are expensive to craft and give the holder passive effects.
body:
Adds 4 new totems that give small, but meaningful passive buffs at the expense of being costly to make. These passive buffs are only active when being held in the offhand.

**Totem of Unmoored**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01bdcf8de13cd08ef73ff9f6938467f56d6a0f84.png)

Crafted w/

- Tide Smithing Template
- Totem of Undying
- Conduit

Gives the user 2 luck, (Only really useful for fishing.) 10 oxygen bonus, (Oxygen bonus is a chance to not consume your oxygen when submerged. So this is more significant than it may seem. [Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Attribute#Oxygen_bonus).) 2 submerged mining speed, and 1 water movement efficiency. 

**Totem of Unbroken**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d14f49ccd3475209d2d7f82460b18439bf242c.png)

Crafted w/

- Vex Smithing Template
- Totem of Undying
- Block of Netherite

Gives the user 2 armor toughness, and 50% knockback resistance. A full set of netherite gives you 40% knockback resist.

**Totem of Unending**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecd8608e8131e2734f74051ec1f01fa4fbd0cd50.png)

Crafted w/

- Spire Smithing Template
- Totem of Undying
- Elytra

Gives the user decreased gravity, which helps a lot in elytra flight. Also gives the user an increased safe fall distance of 7, for a total of 10. (Lower velocity on impact does not typically help very much with fall damage. So even with a lower gravity attribute you'll typically still take damage in weird situations. That's why this is increased.)

**Totem of Unyielding**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe43134c9be3e4e02b66ffc951e36a9c52c6cd19.png)

Crafted w/

- Silence Smithing Template
- Totem of Undying
- Nether Star

Gives the user increased speed. (It's really hard to specifically quantify this value so just know, its a meaningful amount.) and +4 max health.

Textures are currently in the style of [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape), as that's the texture pack I've used for a long time. They are also placeholder and will hopefully be greatly improved in the near future. 

If you are installing the Datapack, please install the resource pack. If you are installing the mod, assets are built in.
